title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: AI Jason presents a cheat sheet and overview of AI agent architectures, focusing on Autoresearch and AutoAgent frameworks. The video compares memory systems used in Claude Code, the self-evolution mechanisms in Hermes and Openclaw, highlighting different approaches to building and improving autonomous agents.
